headline: Regeneron (REGN) Enters $2.32B Collaboration With Parabilis to Target ‘Undruggable’ Proteins
summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ:REGN) is one of the cheap NASDAQ stocks to buy right now. On May 19, Regeneron Pharmaceuticals entered into a $2.32 billion research collaboration with Parabilis Medicines to develop therapeutic candidates using Parabilis’ Helicon peptide platform. The partnership will focus on creating Helicons (stabilized, cell-penetrant alpha-helical peptides) that can be used as […]
